metadata.sources: Rich Ryan, Dan Plews, WOD Science, Fathom Nutrition, Matt Fitzgerald

plan_durations.source: Rich Ryan: '8 to 16 weeks for a specific training block'

base.primary_focus: Build aerobic engine and movement quality

training_emphasis.running: High volume, mostly Zone 2 (70-80%). Build to target weekly mileage.
training_emphasis.strength: General strength, compound movements, moderate loads, higher reps (8-12)
training_emphasis.hyrox_specific: Movement quality practice at stations, no race-pace work

progression_rules: Increase weekly running volume by 5-10% per week

build.primary_focus: Develop threshold, strength endurance, and HYROX-specific fitness

training_emphasis.running: Maintain volume, add 1-2 threshold sessions/week. 80% Zone 2, 20% Zone 4.
training_emphasis.strength: Transition to strength endurance: higher reps (12-20), moderate loads, shorter rest
training_emphasis.hyrox_specific: Station complexes, compromised running, transition practice

progression_rules: Increase station weights toward race weight
Full simulation every 3-4 weeks at 90-95% effort

peak.primary_focus: Race-specific fitness, pacing practice, confidence building

training_emphasis.running: Race-pace work, pacing practice. Maintain but don't increase volume.
training_emphasis.strength: Maintain only. No new adaptations sought.
training_emphasis.hyrox_specific: Full or partial simulations at race pace. Practice transitions and pacing.

progression_rules: Volume starts to decrease (10-15% per week)
Final full simulation 2-3 weeks before race

taper.primary_focus: Shed fatigue while maintaining fitness. Arrive fresh and confident.

training_emphasis.running: Reduce volume 40-50%. Keep 1-2 short sharp sessions.
training_emphasis.strength: Minimal. 1 light session to maintain neural patterns.
training_emphasis.hyrox_specific: Short openers only. No full simulations.

deload_protocol.what_to_maintain: Session frequency (keep showing up), movement quality
deload_protocol.source: Rich Ryan: 'every 3rd or 4th week taking about 30% off both intensity and volume'

standard.note: Most common, aligns with work/life schedule

extended.note: For athletes who need more recovery between hard sessions

microcycle_options.source: Rich Ryan: '7 days standard, but 9, 10, or 14 days can work'
